The '''bio cannon''' was a gigantic [[Droid/Legends|droid]], similar to a [[Droideka/Legends|droideka]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Ball Gun]], that served essentially as a heavy weapon. It was employed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. Similar to the droideka and [[Droideka Mark II]], it could roll in an armored sphere form. The design also had four legs to stand on.

The design was similar in function to the [[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery|SPHA-T]], but had less protection.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Biocannon.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A bio cannon in action during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].]]
Bio cannons appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].

*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
